summary: Iteration 56 - Complete testing of Block B (Customer Portal Settings/Documents/Consents), Block D (Admin User Management + Webhook Event Store), Block E (Outbound Lead Machine), Block G (CORS/Security Headers). All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified successfully.

minor.issue: CORS is set to wildcard (*) - acceptable for preview but should be restricted in production

action_items: Consider restricting CORS origins in production (currently wildcard *)
seed_data_creation: Created test outbound lead via discover API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified all new Block B/D/E/G features. Key findings: 1) Admin User Management (Benutzer) works - shows 1 admin user, create/delete works, self-deletion blocked. 2) Webhook Event Store (Webhooks) works - shows events table with refresh button. 3) Customer Portal endpoints correctly require JWT auth (401/403 for unauthenticated). 4) Security headers present (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Strict-Transport-Security, X-XSS-Protection). 5) CORS is wildcard (*) in preview - acceptable but should be restricted in production. 6) Outbound Lead Machine shows 34 leads, 8.8% conversion, pipeline stages work. 7) All admin views work: Dashboard (71 leads, 27 bookings, 3 chats), Projects (7), Contracts (43), Monitoring (all systems OK), Legal (3 open risks), Billing (50 quotes, 35 invoices). DeepSeek LLM is MOCKED via Emergent GPT-5.2 fallback.
